column1: Before using Jana, please review and accept the following terms:
column2: Preden uporabite Jana, preberite in sprejmite naslednje pogoje:

column1: Jana is an AI assistant. AI-generated responses may be inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated. You are responsible for verifying all information before acting on it.
column2: Jana je pomočnik UI. Odgovori, ki jih ustvari UI, so lahko netočni, nepopolni ali zastareli. Sami ste odgovorni za preverjanje vseh informacij, preden ukrepate.

column1: If you bring your own API keys (BYOK), you are responsible for all costs and usage with your LLM provider. Jana does not manage, limit, or monitor your provider billing.
column2: Če uporabljate lastne ključe API (BYOK), ste odgovorni za vse stroške in uporabo pri vašem ponudniku LLM. Jana ne upravlja, omejuje ali spremlja obračunavanja vašega ponudnika.

column1: Jana does not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, or suitability of AI responses for any particular purpose.
column2: Jana ne zagotavlja točnosti, zanesljivosti ali primernosti odgovorov UI za kakršenkoli določen namen.

column1: Your conversations are stored on this Frappe site. Data sent to cloud LLM providers is subject to their data handling policies.
column2: Vaši pogovori so shranjeni na tej Frappe strani. Podatki poslani ponudnikom LLM v oblaku so predmet njihovih pravil obdelave podatkov.
